Neda Mansoorian of McManis Faulkner & Morgan, 408-279-8700, appearing for plaintiff and responding party

MINI MINUTES: Appearance for Plaintiff and Defendant Gilbert. The OSC is re-set to 11/14/2006 at 10:00 AM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Scott Hughes, CSR#12365. (212)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-15-2006 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Aug-01-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly for trial by jury.

Appearances:
COLLEEN P. DUFFY-SMITH, Esq. on behalf of plaintiff Margaret Geisheker
JOHN S. KRUG, Esq. on behalf of defendant Bruce Ivan Gilbert

The parties settled after being sent to Judge Pro Tem. Terms of the settlement were as follows: Defendant to pay plaintiff the sum of $75,000.00. Each side to bear own costs and fees.

Hon. Robert L. Dondero; Clerk: V.Mu; Reporter: Rita Howell, #2542 (206)
